title: School Admin — Student Records
content:
Overview


The Student Records page has four tabs: Active Students, Alumni, Promote Students, and Activity. It's where admins manage grade levels, track student activity, graduate students, and maintain alumni records.



Active Students Tab


Shows all currently enrolled students with their name, email, and grade level. Key features:


  • Search: Filter by name or email
  • Grade filter: Dropdown to view students by specific grade level (Kindergarten through Grade 12, Year 1–5+, Other, or No Grade Set)
  • Edit: Click a student to update their grade level directly from this tab

This tab is useful for quick grade-level lookups and verifying which students are at which level before running a promotion.



Alumni Tab


Shows all graduated students. Key features:


  • Search: Filter by name or email
  • Graduation year filter: Dropdown populated with all graduation years present in the records
  • View: See each alumnus's name, email, grade at graduation, and graduation year

Students are moved to Alumni automatically when they are promoted past the final grade level (Grade 12 or Year 5+). Alumni records are retained permanently for school records and transcript requests.



Promote Students Tab


This is where admins advance students to the next grade level at the end of a school year or term. Key features:


  • Stats banner: Shows a summary of students per current grade level, helping admins see the distribution before promoting
  • Grade filter: Choose to promote all students or only those in a specific grade
  • Preview table: Shows exactly which students will be promoted and what their new grade will be before any changes are made

How Promotion Works:


  1. Select a grade filter (e.g., "Grade 11" to promote only 11th graders, or "All Students" to promote everyone)
  2. Review the preview table — it shows current grade and target grade for each student
  3. Click Promote Selected to execute the promotion

Important promotion rules:


  • Grade 12 students are marked as Graduated and moved to the Alumni tab — they do not advance to a new grade
  • Year 5+ students are also marked as Graduated and moved to Alumni
  • Students with no grade set are flagged in a warning notice — they will be skipped during promotion and should be manually reviewed
  • All other students advance one level (e.g., Grade 9 → Grade 10, Year 3 → Year 4)

The promotion is permanent and cannot be undone in bulk. Double-check the preview before confirming.



Activity Tab


Tracks which students have been inactive on the portal. Key features:


  • Threshold selector: Choose the inactivity period — 7, 14, 30, or 60 days
  • Summary strip: Shows counts of inactive students at a glance
  • Search: Filter the inactive student list by name or email
  • Nudge All: Send a reminder notification to all inactive students in the current filtered view

The table shows each inactive student's name, grade level, last seen date, and number of days inactive. This helps admins identify students who may need outreach or intervention.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "The Promote tab shows you a preview before anything changes — review it carefully before clicking Promote."
  • "Grade 12 and Year 5+ students graduate automatically. They'll move to the Alumni tab."
  • "Students with no grade set won't be promoted — the system flags them so you can assign a grade manually first."
  • "The Activity tab lets you see who hasn't logged in recently. You can nudge them all at once."
  • "Alumni records are kept permanently — they don't count toward your active student total for billing."
